name: vibecoding-edu
description: The only educational platform for understanding AI-generated code

scripts.build: pnpm --dir packages/core build && pnpm --dir packages/cli-analyzer build && pnpm --dir packages/vscode-extension build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir packages/core typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/cli-analyzer typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/vscode-extension typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir packages/core lint && pnpm --dir packages/cli-analyzer lint && pnpm --dir packages/vscode-extension lint
scripts.test: pnpm --dir packages/core test && pnpm --dir packages/cli-analyzer test && pnpm --dir packages/vscode-extension test
